adaptive.mode: adaptive multi-turn v2 (3/batch, 20 history, 5 max supplements)

findings.quality: Adaptive mode produces significantly deeper financial intuition (l3) thanks to context_excerpt anchoring the model in the paper's original text.
findings.speed_penalty: Adaptive mode is ~2x slower due to: (1) Pass 1 outputs context_excerpt (10x more chars), (2) multi-turn requires 2 rounds per batch (initial + supplement for 100% of signals).
findings.supplement_pattern: Round 1: 0/3 completed, all need supplements. Round 2: 3/3 completed after supplement. This is consistent: 101 alphas formulas are complex enough that context_excerpt alone is insufficient.
findings.json_parse_failures: 5 JSON parse failures out of ~34 rounds (~15% rate). These are retried in subsequent rounds.

recommendation: For COMPLEX papers (101 alphas, long formulas): adaptive mode is SLOWER but produces DEEPER financial intuition. Use when quality > speed.\n\nFor SIMPLE papers (广发 with simple signal names): adaptive mode should be faster. Need separate A/B test on simpler papers to confirm.
